# Gorilla Trekking Guest House

> Boutique guest house in Musanze, Rwanda — minutes from Volcanoes National Park. Rooms, restaurant, bar, and curated gorilla trekking tours.

Gorilla Trekking Guest House offers comfortable accommodation for travellers visiting Volcanoes National Park to track mountain gorillas and golden monkeys. We provide direct online booking in RWF/USD/EUR/GBP, a full-service restaurant and bar, and guided trekking packages (half-day, full-day, and 3-day adventures).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the guest house, rooms, dining, and trekking packages
- [Rooms & Suites](/rooms): Browse available rooms with live pricing and direct booking
- [Restaurant & Bar Menu](/menu): Order food and drinks; in-room dining for guests

## Optional

- [Sign In](/auth): Guest account access
- [My Dashboard](/dashboard): Manage bookings and in-stay services
